item.title: Version 0.1.14
item.description:
What's new in 0.1.14

  • Live presence in solo chats — typing, recording audio, online, last seen.
  • Menu-bar status item + Dock badge for total unread across accounts.
  • Native notifications tab in Settings with permission check and test banner.
  • MCP write tools live: send_message, create_group, list_group_members, check_phone.
  • One-click MCP installers for Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Continue.
  • Reply quote previews and lazy group title hydration.
  • Stickers, locations and unsupported messages no longer render as empty bubbles.
  • TR / EN language picker in Settings.
  • Fix: no more "online" claim for every contact.
  • Fix: foreground notification banners + send-echo duplicate row.
  • Build: proper Developer ID signing + notarization via keychain profile.
